question: How many products do we have?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(p.product_id) AS number_of_products
FROM product AS p
LIMIT 1000

question: List all active products
sql:
SELECT
  p1.product_id,
  p1.category_id,
  p1.storage_condition_id,
  p1.dosage_form_id,
  p1.status,
  p1.name,
  p1.code,
  p1.launch_date,
  p1.shelf_life_months,
  p1.description,
  p1.strength
FROM product AS p1
WHERE
  p1.status = 'active'
LIMIT 1000

question: How many employees are there?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(t1.employee_id) AS num_employees
FROM employee AS t1
WHERE
  t1.is_active = TRUE
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all suppliers
sql:
SELECT
  s1.supplier_id,
  s1.country_id,
  s1.is_approved,
  s1.name,
  s1.code,
  s1.contact_name,
  s1.phone,
  s1.gmp_certified,
  s1.approval_date,
  s1.rating,
  s1.contact_email
FROM
  supplier AS s1
LIMIT 1000

question: How many batches were produced in 2025?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(t1.batch_id) AS total_batches_produced
FROM batch AS t1
WHERE
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t1.start_date) = 2025
LIMIT 1000

question: List all rejected batches
sql:
SELECT
  t1.batch_id,
  t1.order_id,
  t1.site_id,
  t1.line_id,
  t1.product_id,
  t1.released_by,
  t1.supervisor_id,
  t1.bom_id,
  t1.shift_type_id,
  t1.status,
  t1.batch_number,
  t1.released_date,
  t1.end_date,
  t1.start_date,
  t1.batch_size,
  t1.yield_quantity,
  t1.yield_pct
FROM batch AS t1
WHERE
  t1.status = 'rejected'
LIMIT 1000

question: How many scrap events happened?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(t1.scrap_id) AS number_of_scrap_events
FROM scrap_event AS t1
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all equipment types
sql:
SELECT
  t1.equipment_type_id,
  t1.name,
  t1.description,
  t1.category
FROM equipment_type AS t1
LIMIT 1000

question: List all dosage forms
sql:
SELECT
  t1.dosage_form_id,
  t1.name,
  t1.description
FROM dosage_form AS t1
LIMIT 1000

question: How many raw materials are there?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(t1.material_id)
FROM raw_material AS t1
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all defect types with severity critical
sql:
SELECT
  t1.defect_type_id,
  t1.severity,
  t1.name,
  t1.description,
  t1.code
FROM defect_type AS t1
WHERE
  t1.severity = 'critical'
LIMIT 1000

question: List all sites
sql:
SELECT
  s.site_id,
  s.country_id,
  s.name,
  s.address,
  s.code,
  s.max_capacity_units_per_day,
  s.gmp_certified
FROM site AS s
LIMIT 1000

question: How many production lines are active?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(t1.line_id) AS active_production_lines
FROM production_line AS t1
WHERE
  t1.status = 'active'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all scrap reasons in the equipment category
sql:
SELECT
  t1.reason_id,
  t1.category,
  t1.name,
  t1.code,
  t1.description
FROM scrap_reason AS t1
WHERE
  t1.category = 'equipment'
LIMIT 1000

question: What are the different shift types?
sql:
SELECT
  shift_type.name
FROM shift_type
LIMIT 1000

question: How many open deviations are there?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(d.deviation_id) AS number_of_open_deviations
FROM
  deviation AS d
WHERE
  d.status = 'open'
LIMIT 1000

question: List all waste categories
sql:
SELECT
  t1.waste_category_id,
  t1.name,
  t1.regulatory_code,
  t1.disposal_method
FROM waste_category AS t1
LIMIT 1000

question: Show batches with yield below 90%
sql:
SELECT
  t1.batch_id,
  t1.batch_number,
  t1.yield_pct
FROM batch AS t1
WHERE
  t1.yield_pct < 90
LIMIT 1000

question: How many customers do we have?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(c.customer_id) AS number_of_customers
FROM customer AS c
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the total number of test types?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(t1.test_type_id) AS total_number_of_test_types
FROM test_type AS t1
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all batches with their product names
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_id,
  b.product_id,
  b.bom_id,
  b.order_id,
  b.line_id,
  b.supervisor_id,
  b.site_id,
  b.released_by,
  b.shift_type_id,
  b.batch_number,
  b.yield_quantity,
  b.status,
  b.released_date,
  b.batch_size,
  b.yield_pct,
  b.end_date,
  b.start_date,
  p.name AS product_name
FROM batch AS b
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List employees and their departments
sql:
SELECT
  e.first_name,
  e.last_name,
  d.name AS department_name
FROM employee AS e
JOIN department AS d
  ON e.department_id = d.department_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Show scrap events with their reason names
sql:
SELECT
  se.scrap_id,
  se.reason_id,
  se.reported_by,
  se.step_id,
  se.batch_id,
  se.equipment_id,
  se.shift_type_id,
  se.uom_id,
  se.scrap_date,
  se.description,
  se.cost_impact,
  se.quantity,
  se.root_cause,
  se.corrective_action,
  sr.name AS reason_name
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Which products are in the Analgesic category?
sql:
SELECT
  p.name
FROM product AS p
JOIN product_category AS pc
  ON p.category_id = pc.category_id
WHERE
  pc.name = 'Analgesic'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show equipment with their type names
sql:
SELECT
  e.name,
  et.name AS equipment_type_name
FROM equipment AS e
JOIN equipment_type AS et
  ON e.equipment_type_id = et.equipment_type_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List all suppliers from India
sql:
SELECT
  s.supplier_id,
  s.country_id,
  s.name,
  s.contact_email,
  s.contact_name,
  s.code,
  s.is_approved,
  s.phone,
  s.rating,
  s.approval_date,
  s.gmp_certified
FROM supplier AS s
JOIN country AS c
  ON s.country_id = c.country_id
WHERE
  c.name = 'India'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show batches with their production line names
sql:
SELECT
  t1.batch_number,
  t2.name
FROM batch AS t1
JOIN production_line AS t2
  ON t1.line_id = t2.line_id
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the total scrap cost per batch?
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_number,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
GROUP BY
  b.batch_number
ORDER BY
  b.batch_number
LIMIT 1000

question: Show deviations with their type names and severity
sql:
SELECT
  d.deviation_number,
  d.description,
  dt.name AS type_name,
  dt.severity
FROM
  deviation AS d
  JOIN deviation_type AS dt ON d.deviation_type_id = dt.deviation_type_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List all GMP certified suppliers with their country
sql:
SELECT
  s.name,
  c.name AS country
FROM supplier AS s
JOIN country AS c
  ON s.country_id = c.country_id
WHERE
  s.gmp_certified = TRUE
LIMIT 1000

question: Show batch yield by product name
sql:
SELECT
  t2.name,
  AVG(t1.yield_pct) AS average_batch_yield_percentage
FROM batch AS t1
JOIN product AS t2
  ON t1.product_id = t2.product_id
GROUP BY
  t2.name
ORDER BY
  t2.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Which raw materials are classified as API?
sql:
SELECT
  rm.name
FROM raw_material AS rm
JOIN material_class AS mc
  ON rm.class_id = mc.class_id
WHERE
  mc.description = 'API - the active drug substance'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all approved material lots with their material names
sql:
SELECT
  ml.lot_id,
  ml.lot_number,
  ml.material_id,
  rm.name AS material_name,
  ml.supplier_id,
  ml.receipt_line_id,
  ml.status,
  ml.approved_by,
  ml.approved_date,
  ml.quantity_received,
  ml.quantity_available,
  ml.quantity_consumed,
  ml.quantity_rejected,
  ml.manufacturing_date,
  ml.expiry_date,
  ml.warehouse_location
FROM material_lot AS ml
JOIN raw_material AS rm
  ON ml.material_id = rm.material_id
WHERE
  ml.status = 'approved'
LIMIT 1000

question: List QC test results that failed
sql:
SELECT
  qtr.result_id,
  qs.sample_number,
  tt.name AS test_name,
  qtr.test_date,
  qtr.result_value,
  qtr.spec_min,
  qtr.spec_max,
  qtr.passed
FROM qc_test_result AS qtr
JOIN qc_sample AS qs
  ON qtr.sample_id = qs.sample_id
JOIN test_type AS tt
  ON qtr.test_type_id = tt.test_type_id
WHERE
  qtr.passed = false
LIMIT 1000

question: Show production orders with their product names
sql:
SELECT
  t1.order_id,
  t1.product_id,
  t1.line_id,
  t1.created_by,
  t1.priority_id,
  t1.mbr_id,
  t1.site_id,
  t1.order_number,
  t1.planned_quantity,
  t1.status,
  t1.actual_end_date,
  t1.planned_end_date,
  t1.planned_start_date,
  t1.actual_start_date,
  t2.name AS product_name
FROM production_order AS t1
JOIN product AS t2
  ON t1.product_id = t2.product_id
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the average batch yield per product?
sql:
SELECT
  t2.name,
  AVG(t1.yield_pct) AS average_batch_yield
FROM batch AS t1
JOIN product AS t2
  ON t1.product_id = t2.product_id
GROUP BY
  t2.name
ORDER BY
  t2.name
LIMIT 1000

question: List all CAPAs that are still open
sql:
SELECT
  t1.capa_id,
  t1.deviation_id,
  t1.oos_id,
  t1.verified_by,
  t1.owner_id,
  t1.capa_type_id,
  t1.description,
  t1.status,
  t1.capa_number,
  t1.opened_date,
  t1.root_cause,
  t1.due_date,
  t1.proposed_action,
  t1.completed_date,
  t1.effectiveness_check,
  t1.verified_date,
  t1.actual_action
FROM capa AS t1
WHERE
  t1.status = 'open'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show equipment maintenance records with equipment names
sql:
SELECT
  e.name AS equipment_name,
  em.maintenance_id,
  em.equipment_id,
  em.performed_by,
  em.maintenance_type_id,
  em.parts_replaced,
  em.status,
  em.findings,
  em.scheduled_date,
  em.cost,
  em.completed_date
FROM equipment_maintenance AS em
JOIN equipment AS e
  ON em.equipment_id = e.equipment_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Which batches were supervised by John Anderson?
sql:
SELECT
  b.*
FROM batch AS b
JOIN employee AS e
  ON b.supervisor_id = e.employee_id
WHERE
  e.first_name = 'John' AND e.last_name = 'Anderson'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show total scrap quantity by scrap reason
sql:
SELECT
  sr.name,
  SUM(se.quantity) AS total_scrap_quantity
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
GROUP BY
  sr.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show scrap events from the Morning shift with reason names and batch numbers
sql:
SELECT
  se.scrap_id,
  se.shift_type_id,
  se.batch_id,
  se.reason_id,
  se.equipment_id,
  se.step_id,
  se.uom_id,
  se.reported_by,
  se.quantity,
  se.scrap_date,
  se.description,
  se.root_cause,
  se.cost_impact,
  se.corrective_action,
  sr.name AS reason_name,
  b.batch_number
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN shift_type AS st
  ON se.shift_type_id = st.shift_type_id
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
WHERE
  st.name = 'Morning'
LIMIT 1000

question: List all batches of Paracetamol 500mg with their yield and production line
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_number,
  b.yield_quantity,
  pl.name AS production_line
FROM batch AS b
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN production_line AS pl
  ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
WHERE
  p.name LIKE 'Paracetamol%'
  AND p.strength = '500mg'
  AND p.status = 'active'
  AND pl.status = 'active'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show equipment downtime with equipment name and type
sql:
SELECT
  e.name AS equipment_name,
  et.name AS equipment_type,
  ed.start_time,
  ed.end_time,
  ed.category,
  ed.reason,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ed.end_time - ed.start_time)) / 3600 AS downtime_hours
FROM equipment_downtime AS ed
JOIN equipment AS e
  ON ed.equipment_id = e.equipment_id
JOIN equipment_type AS et
  ON e.equipment_type_id = et.equipment_type_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Which suppliers provided materials used in rejected batches?
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  s.name
FROM batch AS b
JOIN batch_material_usage AS bmu
  ON b.batch_id = bmu.batch_id
JOIN material_lot AS ml
  ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
JOIN supplier AS s
  ON ml.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
WHERE
  b.status = 'rejected'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show scrap events where the reason category is equipment and batch yield was below 95%
sql:
SELECT
  se.scrap_id,
  se.batch_id,
  se.reason_id,
  se.equipment_id,
  se.uom_id,
  se.shift_type_id,
  se.step_id,
  se.reported_by,
  se.description,
  se.root_cause,
  se.quantity,
  se.cost_impact,
  se.corrective_action,
  se.scrap_date
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
WHERE
  sr.category = 'equipment' AND b.yield_pct < 95
LIMIT 1000

question: List deviations with their CAPA status and batch product name
sql:
SELECT
  d.deviation_number,
  c.status AS capa_status,
  p.name AS product_name
FROM deviation AS d
LEFT JOIN capa AS c
  ON d.deviation_id = c.deviation_id
LEFT JOIN batch AS b
  ON d.batch_id = b.batch_id
LEFT JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all batches produced at the US site with their product names and yields
sql:
SELECT
  t1.batch_number,
  t4.name AS product_name,
  t1.yield_quantity,
  t1.yield_pct
FROM batch AS t1
INNER JOIN site AS t2
  ON t1.site_id = t2.site_id
INNER JOIN country AS t3
  ON t2.country_id = t3.country_id
INNER JOIN product AS t4
  ON t1.product_id = t4.product_id
WHERE
  t3.code = 'US'
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the scrap cost by production line and product?
sql:
SELECT
  t2.name AS production_line,
  t3.name AS product,
  SUM(t1.total_scrap_cost) AS scrap_cost
FROM scrap_trend AS t1
JOIN production_line AS t2
  ON t1.line_id = t2.line_id
JOIN product AS t3
  ON t1.product_id = t3.product_id
GROUP BY
  t2.name,
  t3.name
ORDER BY
  production_line,
  product
LIMIT 1000

question: Show QC test results for batch BN-2025-001 with test type names
sql:
SELECT
  tt.name,
  qtr.result_id,
  qtr.test_date,
  qtr.result_value,
  qtr.result_text,
  qtr.spec_min,
  qtr.spec_max,
  qtr.passed
FROM qc_test_result AS qtr
JOIN test_type AS tt
  ON qtr.test_type_id = tt.test_type_id
JOIN qc_sample AS qs
  ON qtr.sample_id = qs.sample_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON qs.batch_id = b.batch_id
WHERE
  b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-001'
LIMIT 1000

question: List employees who performed equipment maintenance and their department
sql:
SELECT
  e.first_name,
  e.last_name,
  d.name AS department_name
FROM equipment_maintenance AS em
JOIN employee AS e
  ON em.performed_by = e.employee_id
JOIN department AS d
  ON e.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY
  e.first_name,
  e.last_name,
  d.name
ORDER BY
  e.last_name,
  e.first_name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show material lots that were rejected with supplier names and material names
sql:
SELECT
  s.name AS supplier_name,
  rm.name AS material_name,
  ml.lot_number
FROM material_lot AS ml
JOIN supplier AS s
  ON ml.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
JOIN raw_material AS rm
  ON ml.material_id = rm.material_id
WHERE
  ml.status = 'rejected'
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the total scrap cost per site?
sql:
SELECT
  s.name,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN site AS s
  ON b.site_id = s.site_id
GROUP BY
  s.name
ORDER BY
  total_scrap_cost DESC
LIMIT 1000

question: Show batches with their BOM details and product names
sql:
SELECT
  t1.batch_number,
  t1.batch_id,
  t4.name AS product_name,
  t2.bom_id,
  t2.version,
  t2.status,
  t3.bom_line_id,
  t3.material_id,
  t3.quantity_per_batch,
  t3.is_active_ingredient
FROM batch AS t1
INNER JOIN bill_of_materials AS t2
  ON t1.bom_id = t2.bom_id
INNER JOIN bom_line AS t3
  ON t2.bom_id = t3.bom_id
INNER JOIN product AS t4
  ON t1.product_id = t4.product_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List all environmental monitoring readings that were out of spec with area names
sql:
SELECT
  em.monitoring_id,
  em.area_id,
  em.monitored_by,
  em.within_spec,
  em.temperature_c,
  em.humidity_pct,
  em.differential_pressure_pa,
  em.particle_count_05um,
  em.particle_count_5um,
  em.monitoring_date,
  pa.name AS area_name
FROM
  environmental_monitoring AS em
  JOIN production_area AS pa ON em.area_id = pa.area_id
WHERE
  em.within_spec = false
LIMIT 1000

question: Show OEE records for Tablet Line 1 with equipment names
sql:
SELECT
  t1.oee_id,
  t1.record_date,
  t1.oee_pct,
  t1.availability_pct,
  t1.performance_pct,
  t1.quality_pct,
  t1.good_units_produced,
  t1.total_units_produced,
  t1.actual_runtime_minutes,
  t1.planned_runtime_minutes,
  t3.name AS equipment_name
FROM oee_record AS t1
JOIN production_line AS t2
  ON t1.line_id = t2.line_id
JOIN equipment AS t3
  ON t1.equipment_id = t3.equipment_id
WHERE
  t2.name = 'Tablet Line 1' AND t2.status = 'active' AND t3.status = 'active'
LIMIT 1000

question: Which operators ran batches on the Morning shift that had scrap events?
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  e.first_name,
  e.last_name
FROM
  employee AS e
  JOIN batch_step_execution AS bse
    ON e.employee_id = bse.performed_by
  JOIN batch AS b
    ON bse.batch_id = b.batch_id
  JOIN shift_type AS st
    ON b.shift_type_id = st.shift_type_id
  JOIN scrap_event AS se
    ON b.batch_id = se.batch_id
WHERE
  st.name = 'Morning'
  AND e.job_title = 'Operator'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all complaints with product and customer names
sql:
SELECT
  c.complaint_id,
  c.complaint_number,
  c.complaint_type,
  c.description,
  c.status,
  c.severity,
  c.received_date,
  c.closed_date,
  c.investigation,
  c.root_cause,
  c.reportable,
  c.product_id,
  c.customer_id,
  c.batch_id,
  c.capa_id,
  p.name AS product_name,
  cu.name AS customer_name
FROM complaint AS c
JOIN product AS p
  ON c.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN customer AS cu
  ON c.customer_id = cu.customer_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List batch costs broken down by cost type for rejected batches
sql:
SELECT
  t1.cost_type,
  SUM(t1.amount) AS total_cost
FROM batch_cost AS t1
JOIN batch AS t2
  ON t1.batch_id = t2.batch_id
WHERE
  t2.status = 'rejected'
GROUP BY
  t1.cost_type
LIMIT 1000

question: Show process steps for Paracetamol 500mg with their parameters
sql:
SELECT
  ps.step_number,
  ps.name AS step_name,
  ps.description AS step_description,
  pp.name AS parameter_name,
  pp.min_value,
  pp.target_value,
  pp.max_value
FROM product AS p
JOIN master_batch_record AS mbr
  ON p.product_id = mbr.product_id
JOIN process_step AS ps
  ON mbr.mbr_id = ps.mbr_id
LEFT JOIN process_parameter AS pp
  ON ps.step_id = pp.step_id
WHERE
  p.name = 'Paracetamol 500mg Tablets' AND p.strength = '500mg'
ORDER BY
  ps.step_number
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the average OEE by production line?
sql:
SELECT
  t2.name,
  AVG(t1.oee_pct) AS average_oee
FROM oee_record AS t1
JOIN production_line AS t2
  ON t1.line_id = t2.line_id
GROUP BY
  t2.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show scrap events with batch number, product name, line name, shift type, and scrap reason category
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name,
  pl.name AS line_name,
  st.name AS shift_type,
  sr.category AS scrap_reason_category
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN production_line AS pl
  ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
JOIN shift_type AS st
  ON se.shift_type_id = st.shift_type_id
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
LIMIT 1000

question: For each supplier, show total quantity of materials received and how many lots were rejected
sql:
SELECT
  s.name,
  SUM(ml.quantity_received) AS total_quantity_received,
  COUNT(ml.lot_id) FILTER (WHERE ml.status = 'rejected') AS rejected_lots_count
FROM
  supplier AS s
LEFT JOIN
  material_lot AS ml
  ON s.supplier_id = ml.supplier_id
GROUP BY
  s.name
ORDER BY
  s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show deviations that led to CAPAs with the batch product name, deviation type, and CAPA owner name
sql:
SELECT
  p.name AS batch_product_name,
  dt.name AS deviation_type,
  e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS capa_owner_name
FROM capa AS c
JOIN deviation AS d
  ON c.deviation_id = d.deviation_id
JOIN deviation_affected_batch AS dab
  ON d.deviation_id = dab.deviation_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON dab.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN deviation_type AS dt
  ON d.deviation_type_id = dt.deviation_type_id
JOIN employee AS e
  ON c.owner_id = e.employee_id
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the scrap rate by product and site for Q1 2025?
sql:
SELECT
  p.name AS product_name,
  s.name AS site_name,
  SUM(se.quantity) * 100.0 / SUM(b.batch_size) AS scrap_rate_pct
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN site AS s
  ON b.site_id = s.site_id
WHERE
  se.scrap_date >= '2025-01-01' AND se.scrap_date < '2025-04-01'
GROUP BY
  p.name,
  s.name
ORDER BY
  p.name,
  s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show equipment that had both downtime and maintenance in 2025 with their type and location
sql:
WITH downtime_equipment AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    ed.equipment_id
  FROM equipment_downtime AS ed
  WHERE
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ed.start_time) = 2025
), maintenance_equipment AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    em.equipment_id
  FROM equipment_maintenance AS em
  WHERE
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM em.scheduled_date) = 2025
)
SELECT
  e.name,
  et.name AS type,
  s.name AS location
FROM equipment AS e
JOIN downtime_equipment AS de
  ON e.equipment_id = de.equipment_id
JOIN maintenance_equipment AS me
  ON e.equipment_id = me.equipment_id
JOIN equipment_type AS et
  ON e.equipment_type_id = et.equipment_type_id
JOIN department AS d
  ON e.work_center_id = d.department_id
JOIN site AS s
  ON d.site_id = s.site_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List all raw materials from approved Indian suppliers used in batches with yield below 96%
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  t4.name,
  t4.code
FROM batch AS t1
JOIN batch_material_usage AS t2
  ON t1.batch_id = t2.batch_id
JOIN material_lot AS t3
  ON t2.lot_id = t3.lot_id
JOIN raw_material AS t4
  ON t2.material_id = t4.material_id
JOIN supplier AS t5
  ON t3.supplier_id = t5.supplier_id
JOIN country AS t6
  ON t5.country_id = t6.country_id
WHERE
  t1.yield_pct < 96
  AND t5.is_approved = TRUE
  AND t6.name = 'India'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the full deviation-to-CAPA chain: deviation number, type, severity, batch, product, CAPA status, and owner
sql:
SELECT
  d.deviation_number,
  dt.name AS deviation_type,
  dt.severity AS deviation_severity,
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name,
  c.status AS capa_status,
  e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS capa_owner
FROM deviation AS d
JOIN deviation_type AS dt
  ON d.deviation_type_id = dt.deviation_type_id
JOIN capa AS c
  ON d.deviation_id = c.deviation_id
JOIN employee AS e
  ON c.owner_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN batch AS b
  ON d.batch_id = b.batch_id
LEFT JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the total scrap cost by scrap reason category and production line name?
sql:
SELECT
  sr.category,
  pl.name AS production_line_name,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN production_line AS pl
  ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
GROUP BY
  sr.category,
  pl.name
ORDER BY
  sr.category,
  pl.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show batches where in-process checks failed with the test type, batch number, and product
sql:
SELECT
  t1.name AS test_type,
  t2.batch_number,
  t3.name AS product
FROM in_process_check AS t0
JOIN test_type AS t1
  ON t0.test_type_id = t1.test_type_id
JOIN batch AS t2
  ON t0.batch_id = t2.batch_id
JOIN product AS t3
  ON t2.product_id = t3.product_id
WHERE
  t0.passed = false AND t3.status = 'active'
LIMIT 1000

question: For each site, show number of batches, number of scrap events, and total scrap cost in 2025
sql:
SELECT
  s.name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT se.batch_id) AS number_of_batches,
  COUNT(se.scrap_id) AS number_of_scrap_events,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN site AS s
  ON b.site_id = s.site_id
WHERE
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM se.scrap_date) = 2025
GROUP BY
  s.site_id,
  s.name
ORDER BY
  s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Which production lines had the worst OEE and highest scrap rate?
sql:
WITH line_oee AS (
  SELECT
    oee_record.line_id,
    AVG(oee_record.oee_pct) AS average_oee
  FROM oee_record
  GROUP BY
    oee_record.line_id
),
line_scrap AS (
  SELECT
    scrap_trend.line_id,
    AVG(scrap_trend.scrap_rate_pct) AS average_scrap_rate
  FROM scrap_trend
  GROUP BY
    scrap_trend.line_id
)
SELECT
  pl.name AS production_line_name,
  lo.average_oee,
  ls.average_scrap_rate
FROM production_line AS pl
JOIN line_oee AS lo
  ON pl.line_id = lo.line_id
JOIN line_scrap AS ls
  ON pl.line_id = ls.line_id
ORDER BY
  lo.average_oee ASC,
  ls.average_scrap_rate DESC
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all material lots used in batch BN-2025-013 with material name, supplier, and lot status
sql:
SELECT
  rm.name AS material_name,
  s.name AS supplier,
  ml.status AS lot_status
FROM batch AS b
JOIN batch_material_usage AS bmu
  ON b.batch_id = bmu.batch_id
JOIN material_lot AS ml
  ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
JOIN raw_material AS rm
  ON ml.material_id = rm.material_id
JOIN supplier AS s
  ON ml.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
WHERE
  b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-013'
LIMIT 1000

question: List open CAPAs with their deviation details, affected batch, product, and due date
sql:
SELECT
  c.capa_number,
  c.description AS capa_description,
  d.deviation_number,
  d.description AS deviation_description,
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name,
  c.due_date
FROM
  capa AS c
  JOIN deviation AS d ON c.deviation_id = d.deviation_id
  LEFT JOIN deviation_affected_batch AS dab ON d.deviation_id = dab.deviation_id
  LEFT JOIN batch AS b ON dab.batch_id = b.batch_id
  LEFT JOIN product AS p ON b.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE
  c.status = 'open'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the top 5 scrap reasons by total cost with their category
sql:
SELECT
  sr.name,
  sr.category,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_cost
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
GROUP BY
  sr.name,
  sr.category
ORDER BY
  total_cost DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: For each product, show total batches produced, batches rejected, and average yield
sql:
SELECT
  t1.name,
  COUNT(t2.batch_id) AS total_batches_produced,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t2.status = 'rejected') AS batches_rejected,
  AVG(t2.yield_pct) AS average_yield
FROM product AS t1
JOIN batch AS t2
  ON t1.product_id = t2.product_id
WHERE
  t1.status = 'active'
GROUP BY
  t1.product_id,
  t1.name
ORDER BY
  t1.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show sales orders with customer name, product name, and shipment status
sql:
SELECT
  c.name AS customer_name,
  p.name AS product_name,
  s.status AS shipment_status
FROM sales_order AS so
JOIN customer AS c
  ON so.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN sales_order_line AS sol
  ON so.order_id = sol.order_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON sol.product_id = p.product_id
LEFT JOIN shipment AS s
  ON so.order_id = s.order_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Which equipment had calibration failures and what batches were running at the time?
sql:
SELECT
  e.name AS equipment_name,
  b.batch_number
FROM calibration_record AS cr
JOIN equipment AS e
  ON cr.equipment_id = e.equipment_id
JOIN batch_step_execution AS bse
  ON e.equipment_id = bse.equipment_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON bse.batch_id = b.batch_id
WHERE
  cr.passed = false AND cr.calibration_date BETWEEN bse.start_time AND bse.end_time
LIMIT 1000

question: Show scrap events caused by operator error with the operator name, batch, and product
sql:
SELECT
  e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS operator_name,
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
JOIN employee AS e
  ON se.reported_by = e.employee_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE
  sr.name = 'Operator Error'
LIMIT 1000

question: Compare yield trends between US and India sites by month in 2025
sql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', ya.period_start) AS yield_month,
  c.name AS country_name,
  AVG(ya.avg_yield_pct) AS average_yield
FROM yield_analysis AS ya
JOIN site AS s
  ON ya.site_id = s.site_id
JOIN country AS c
  ON s.country_id = c.country_id
WHERE
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ya.period_start) = 2025
  AND c.name IN ('India', 'US')
GROUP BY
  DATE_TRUNC('month', ya.period_start),
  c.name
ORDER BY
  yield_month,
  country_name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the complete batch cost breakdown for all rejected batches with product names
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name,
  bc.cost_type,
  bc.amount,
  c.code AS currency_code,
  cc.name AS cost_center_name,
  bc.recorded_date,
  bc.notes
FROM batch_cost AS bc
JOIN batch AS b
  ON bc.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN currency AS c
  ON bc.currency_id = c.currency_id
JOIN cost_center AS cc
  ON bc.cost_center_id = cc.cost_center_id
WHERE
  b.status = 'rejected'
LIMIT 1000

question: For each supplier, show materials supplied, lots rejected, batches affected by their material quality issues, and any open CAPAs
sql:
WITH SuppliedMaterials AS (
  SELECT
    sm.supplier_id,
    STRING_AGG(rm.name, ', ' ORDER BY rm.name) AS materials_supplied
  FROM supplier_material AS sm
  JOIN raw_material AS rm
    ON sm.material_id = rm.material_id
  GROUP BY
    sm.supplier_id
), RejectedLots AS (
  SELECT
    ml.supplier_id,
    COUNT(ml.lot_id) AS lots_rejected
  FROM material_lot AS ml
  WHERE
    ml.status = 'rejected'
  GROUP BY
    ml.supplier_id
), AffectedBatches AS (
  SELECT
    ml.supplier_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dab.batch_id) AS batches_affected
  FROM material_lot AS ml
  JOIN batch_material_usage AS bmu
    ON ml.lot_id = bmu.lot_id
  JOIN deviation_affected_batch AS dab
    ON bmu.batch_id = dab.batch_id
  GROUP BY
    ml.supplier_id
), OpenCapas AS (
  SELECT
    ml.supplier_id,
    STRING_AGG(c.capa_number, ', ' ORDER BY c.capa_number) AS open_capas
  FROM material_lot AS ml
  JOIN batch_material_usage AS bmu
    ON ml.lot_id = bmu.lot_id
  JOIN deviation_affected_batch AS dab
    ON bmu.batch_id = dab.batch_id
  JOIN capa AS c
    ON dab.deviation_id = c.deviation_id
  WHERE
    c.status = 'open'
  GROUP BY
    ml.supplier_id
)
SELECT
  s.name AS supplier_name,
  sm.materials_supplied,
  COALESCE(rl.lots_rejected, 0) AS lots_rejected,
  COALESCE(ab.batches_affected, 0) AS batches_affected,
  oc.open_capas
FROM supplier AS s
LEFT JOIN SuppliedMaterials AS sm
  ON s.supplier_id = sm.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN RejectedLots AS rl
  ON s.supplier_id = rl.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN AffectedBatches AS ab
  ON s.supplier_id = ab.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN OpenCapas AS oc
  ON s.supplier_id = oc.supplier_id
ORDER BY
  s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the full traceability for batch BN-2025-001: materials used, QC results, yield at each stage, and total cost
sql:
WITH BatchInfo AS (
  SELECT
    b.batch_id
  FROM batch AS b
  WHERE
    b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-001'
)
SELECT
  'Material Used' AS traceability_category,
  rm.name AS item,
  'Lot: ' || ml.lot_number AS details,
  bmu.actual_quantity AS value,
  uom.code AS uom,
  bmu.dispensed_at AS timestamp
FROM batch_material_usage AS bmu
JOIN BatchInfo AS bi
  ON bmu.batch_id = bi.batch_id
JOIN raw_material AS rm
  ON bmu.material_id = rm.material_id
JOIN material_lot AS ml
  ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
JOIN unit_of_measure AS uom
  ON bmu.uom_id = uom.uom_id
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Stage Yield' AS traceability_category,
  byld.stage AS item,
  'Yield Pct: ' || byld.yield_pct AS details,
  byld.output_quantity AS value,
  uom.code AS uom,
  byld.measured_at AS timestamp
FROM batch_yield AS byld
JOIN BatchInfo AS bi
  ON byld.batch_id = bi.batch_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON bi.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN bill_of_materials AS bom
  ON b.bom_id = bom.bom_id
JOIN unit_of_measure AS uom
  ON bom.batch_size_uom_id = uom.uom_id
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'QC Result' AS traceability_category,
  qc.sample_number AS item,
  'Point: ' || qc.sample_point || ' (' || qc.status || ')' AS details,
  qc.quantity AS value,
  NULL AS uom,
  qc.sample_date AS timestamp
FROM qc_sample AS qc
JOIN BatchInfo AS bi
  ON qc.batch_id = bi.batch_id
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Total Cost' AS traceability_category,
  'Total for Batch' AS item,
  NULL AS details,
  SUM(bc.amount) AS value,
  NULL AS uom,
  MAX(bc.recorded_date)::timestamp AS timestamp
FROM batch_cost AS bc
JOIN BatchInfo AS bi
  ON bc.batch_id = bi.batch_id
ORDER BY
  timestamp,
  traceability_category
LIMIT 1000

question: Which production areas had environmental excursions that coincided with batch scrap events?
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  t1.name
FROM production_area AS t1
INNER JOIN environmental_monitoring AS t2
  ON t1.area_id = t2.area_id
INNER JOIN deviation AS t3
  ON t1.area_id = t3.area_id
INNER JOIN scrap_event AS t4
  ON t3.batch_id = t4.batch_id
WHERE
  t2.within_spec = false AND DATE_TRUNC('day', t2.monitoring_date) = DATE_TRUNC('day', t4.scrap_date)
LIMIT 1000

question: Show a supplier quality scorecard: lots received, lots rejected, linked batch failures, and total scrap cost caused by their materials
sql:
WITH lot_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    s.supplier_id,
    COUNT(ml.lot_id) AS lots_received,
    COUNT(ml.lot_id) FILTER (WHERE ml.status = 'rejected') AS lots_rejected
  FROM
    supplier AS s
    JOIN material_lot AS ml
      ON s.supplier_id = ml.supplier_id
  GROUP BY
    s.supplier_id
),
scrap_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    ml.supplier_id,
    SUM(smd.total_cost) AS total_scrap_cost
  FROM
    scrap_material_detail AS smd
    JOIN material_lot AS ml
      ON smd.lot_id = ml.lot_id
  GROUP BY
    ml.supplier_id
),
failure_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    ml.supplier_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mlt.batch_id) AS linked_batch_failures
  FROM
    material_lot_transaction AS mlt
    JOIN material_lot AS ml
      ON mlt.lot_id = ml.lot_id
    JOIN batch AS b
      ON mlt.batch_id = b.batch_id
  WHERE
    b.status = 'rejected'
  GROUP BY
    ml.supplier_id
)
SELECT
  s.name,
  COALESCE(lm.lots_received, 0) AS lots_received,
  COALESCE(lm.lots_rejected, 0) AS lots_rejected,
  COALESCE(fm.linked_batch_failures, 0) AS linked_batch_failures,
  COALESCE(sm.total_scrap_cost, 0) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM
  supplier AS s
  LEFT JOIN lot_metrics AS lm
    ON s.supplier_id = lm.supplier_id
  LEFT JOIN scrap_metrics AS sm
    ON s.supplier_id = sm.supplier_id
  LEFT JOIN failure_metrics AS fm
    ON s.supplier_id = fm.supplier_id
ORDER BY
  s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: For each product, show the batch with the worst yield, its scrap reasons, deviations raised, and total cost impact
sql:
WITH RankedBatches AS (
  SELECT
    b.product_id,
    b.batch_id,
    b.batch_number,
    b.yield_pct,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY b.product_id ORDER BY b.yield_pct ASC) AS rn
  FROM
    batch AS b
)
SELECT
  p.name AS product_name,
  rb.batch_number,
  rb.yield_pct AS worst_yield,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT sr.name, ', ') AS scrap_reasons,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT d.deviation_number, ', ') AS deviations_raised,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_cost_impact
FROM
  RankedBatches AS rb
JOIN
  product AS p
  ON rb.product_id = p.product_id
LEFT JOIN
  scrap_event AS se
  ON rb.batch_id = se.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
  scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
LEFT JOIN
  deviation AS d
  ON rb.batch_id = d.batch_id
WHERE
  rb.rn = 1
GROUP BY
  p.name,
  rb.batch_number,
  rb.yield_pct
ORDER BY
  p.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all employees involved in rejected batches: supervisors, operators who reported scrap, and QC analysts who found OOS results
sql:
WITH rejected_batches AS (
  SELECT
    b.batch_id,
    b.batch_number,
    b.supervisor_id
  FROM
    batch AS b
  WHERE
    b.status = 'rejected'
)
SELECT
  e.first_name,
  e.last_name,
  e.job_title,
  'Supervisor' AS involvement,
  rb.batch_number
FROM
  rejected_batches AS rb
JOIN
  employee AS e
  ON rb.supervisor_id = e.employee_id
UNION ALL
SELECT
  e.first_name,
  e.last_name,
  e.job_title,
  'Operator (Reported Scrap)' AS involvement,
  rb.batch_number
FROM
  rejected_batches AS rb
JOIN
  scrap_event AS se
  ON rb.batch_id = se.batch_id
JOIN
  employee AS e
  ON se.reported_by = e.employee_id
WHERE
  e.job_title = 'Operator'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  e.first_name,
  e.last_name,
  e.job_title,
  'QC Analyst (Found OOS)' AS involvement,
  rb.batch_number
FROM
  rejected_batches AS rb
JOIN
  qc_oos_event AS qoe
  ON rb.batch_id = qoe.batch_id
JOIN
  qc_test_result AS qtr
  ON qoe.result_id = qtr.result_id
JOIN
  employee AS e
  ON qtr.tested_by = e.employee_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Compare equipment OEE against scrap rate for each production line, including the most common scrap reason
sql:
WITH LineOEE AS (
  SELECT
    oee.line_id,
    AVG(oee.oee_pct) AS average_oee
  FROM oee_record AS oee
  GROUP BY
    oee.line_id
),
LineScrapRate AS (
  SELECT
    b.line_id,
    SUM(se.quantity) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(b.batch_size), 0) AS scrap_rate_percentage
  FROM scrap_event AS se
  JOIN batch AS b
    ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
  GROUP BY
    b.line_id
),
LineTopReason AS (
  WITH ReasonCounts AS (
    SELECT
      b.line_id,
      se.reason_id,
      COUNT(se.scrap_id) AS reason_count
    FROM scrap_event AS se
    JOIN batch AS b
      ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
    WHERE
      b.line_id IS NOT NULL
      AND se.reason_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY
      b.line_id,
      se.reason_id
  ),
  RankedReasons AS (
    SELECT
      rc.line_id,
      rc.reason_id,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY rc.line_id ORDER BY rc.reason_count DESC, rc.reason_id ASC) AS rn
    FROM ReasonCounts AS rc
  )
  SELECT
    rr.line_id,
    rr.reason_id
  FROM RankedReasons AS rr
  WHERE
    rr.rn = 1
)
SELECT
  pl.name AS production_line,
  lo.average_oee,
  lsr.scrap_rate_percentage,
  sr.name AS most_common_scrap_reason
FROM production_line AS pl
LEFT JOIN LineOEE AS lo
  ON pl.line_id = lo.line_id
LEFT JOIN LineScrapRate AS lsr
  ON pl.line_id = lsr.line_id
LEFT JOIN LineTopReason AS ltr
  ON pl.line_id = ltr.line_id
LEFT JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON ltr.reason_id = sr.reason_id
ORDER BY
  pl.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the complete deviation history for Tablet Line 1: deviation type, severity, batch affected, root cause, CAPA status, and days to closure
sql:
SELECT
  t1.name AS deviation_type,
  t1.severity,
  t3.batch_number AS batch_affected,
  t4.root_cause,
  t5.status AS capa_status,
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM (t4.closed_date - t4.reported_date)) AS days_to_closure
FROM production_line AS t0
INNER JOIN batch AS t3
  ON t0.line_id = t3.line_id
INNER JOIN deviation_affected_batch AS t2
  ON t3.batch_id = t2.batch_id
INNER JOIN deviation AS t4
  ON t2.deviation_id = t4.deviation_id
INNER JOIN deviation_type AS t1
  ON t4.deviation_type_id = t1.deviation_type_id
LEFT JOIN capa AS t5
  ON t4.deviation_id = t5.deviation_id
WHERE
  t0.name = 'Tablet Line 1'
LIMIT 1000

question: For batch BN-2025-013, show the complete failure chain: what went wrong at each process step, which materials were involved, which deviations were raised, and what the total financial impact was
sql:
WITH batch_info AS (
  SELECT
    b.batch_id
  FROM batch AS b
  WHERE
    b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-013'
),
scrap_materials AS (
  SELECT
    smd.scrap_id,
    STRING_AGG(ml.lot_number, ', ') AS materials_involved
  FROM scrap_material_detail AS smd
  JOIN material_lot AS ml
    ON smd.lot_id = ml.lot_id
  GROUP BY
    smd.scrap_id
),
financial_impact AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.impact) AS total_financial_impact
  FROM (
    SELECT
      bc.amount AS impact
    FROM batch_cost AS bc
    WHERE
      bc.batch_id = (
        SELECT
          batch_id
        FROM batch_info
      )
      AND bc.cost_type = 'scrap'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      se.cost_impact AS impact
    FROM scrap_event AS se
    WHERE
      se.batch_id = (
        SELECT
          batch_id
        FROM batch_info
      )
      AND se.cost_impact IS NOT NULL
  ) AS t
),
all_batch_materials AS (
  SELECT
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT ml.lot_number, ', ') AS materials_list
  FROM batch_material_usage AS bmu
  JOIN material_lot AS ml
    ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
  WHERE
    bmu.batch_id = (
      SELECT
        batch_id
      FROM batch_info
    )
),
failure_chain AS (
  SELECT
    d.reported_date AS event_time,
    'Deviation' AS event_type,
    NULL AS process_step,
    d.description AS what_went_wrong,
    NULL AS specific_materials_involved,
    d.deviation_number
  FROM deviation AS d
  JOIN deviation_affected_batch AS dab
    ON d.deviation_id = dab.deviation_id
  WHERE
    dab.batch_id = (
      SELECT
        batch_id
      FROM batch_info
    )
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    se.scrap_date AS event_time,
    'Scrap' AS event_type,
    ps.name AS process_step,
    se.description AS what_went_wrong,
    sm.materials_involved AS specific_materials_involved,
    NULL AS deviation_number
  FROM scrap_event AS se
  LEFT JOIN process_step AS ps
    ON se.step_id = ps.step_id
  LEFT JOIN scrap_materials AS sm
    ON se.scrap_id = sm.scrap_id
  WHERE
    se.batch_id = (
      SELECT
        batch_id
      FROM batch_info
    )
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    oos.oos_date AS event_time,
    'Out-of-Spec' AS event_type,
    NULL AS process_step,
    oos.description AS what_went_wrong,
    NULL AS specific_materials_involved,
    NULL AS deviation_number
  FROM qc_oos_event AS oos
  WHERE
    oos.batch_id = (
      SELECT
        batch_id
      FROM batch_info
    )
)
SELECT
  fc.event_time,
  fc.event_type,
  fc.process_step,
  fc.what_went_wrong,
  fc.specific_materials_involved,
  abm.materials_list AS all_materials_in_batch,
  fc.deviation_number,
  fi.total_financial_impact
FROM failure_chain AS fc, financial_impact AS fi, all_batch_materials AS abm
ORDER BY
  fc.event_time
LIMIT 1000

question: Which raw materials have the highest scrap cost association across all batches?
sql:
SELECT
  rm.name,
  SUM(smd.total_cost) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM raw_material AS rm
JOIN scrap_material_detail AS smd
  ON rm.material_id = smd.material_id
GROUP BY
  rm.material_id,
  rm.name
ORDER BY
  total_scrap_cost DESC
LIMIT 1000

question: Are there any product recalls?
sql:
SELECT
  p.name AS product_name,
  pr.recall_date,
  pr.reason,
  pr.status,
  pr.recall_class,
  pr.recall_type,
  pr.affected_batches
FROM product_recall AS pr
JOIN product AS p
  ON pr.product_id = p.product_id
ORDER BY
  pr.recall_date DESC
LIMIT 1000

question: Show me batches that have never had any scrap
sql:
SELECT
  t1.product_id,
  t1.batch_id,
  t1.bom_id,
  t1.line_id,
  t1.order_id,
  t1.supervisor_id,
  t1.site_id,
  t1.released_by,
  t1.shift_type_id,
  t1.yield_pct,
  t1.yield_quantity,
  t1.batch_size,
  t1.status,
  t1.batch_number,
  t1.released_date,
  t1.end_date,
  t1.start_date
FROM batch AS t1
WHERE
  NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT
      1
    FROM scrap_event AS t2
    WHERE
      t2.batch_id = t1.batch_id
  )
LIMIT 1000

question: What is our best performing product by yield?
sql:
SELECT
  p.name,
  AVG(ya.avg_yield_pct) AS average_yield
FROM yield_analysis AS ya
JOIN product AS p
  ON ya.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE
  p.status = 'active'
GROUP BY
  p.product_id,
  p.name
ORDER BY
  average_yield DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: How much money did we waste on scrap in total?
sql:
SELECT
  SUM(t1.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM scrap_event AS t1
LIMIT 1000

question: Which batch took the longest to produce?
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_number,
  b.end_date - b.start_date AS production_duration
FROM batch AS b
WHERE
  b.start_date IS NOT NULL
  AND b.end_date IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
  production_duration DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: Show me everything about batch BN-2025-005
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_id,
  b.product_id,
  b.line_id,
  b.order_id,
  b.site_id,
  b.supervisor_id,
  b.released_by,
  b.shift_type_id,
  b.bom_id,
  b.batch_number,
  b.released_date,
  b.start_date,
  b.end_date,
  b.batch_size,
  b.status,
  b.yield_pct,
  b.yield_quantity
FROM batch AS b
WHERE
  b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-005'
LIMIT 1000

question: Are any material lots expiring in the next 6 months?
sql:
SELECT
  t1.lot_number,
  t2.name AS material_name,
  t1.expiry_date
FROM material_lot AS t1
JOIN raw_material AS t2
  ON t1.material_id = t2.material_id
WHERE
  t1.expiry_date >= CURRENT_DATE
  AND t1.expiry_date <= (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '6 months')
LIMIT 1000

question: What percentage of batches were rejected?
sql:
SELECT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS numeric) * 100.0 / COUNT(b.batch_id) AS percentage_of_batches_rejected
FROM batch AS b
LIMIT 1000

question: Show me the most expensive scrap event
sql:
SELECT
  se.scrap_id,
  se.reason_id,
  se.reported_by,
  se.batch_id,
  se.step_id,
  se.equipment_id,
  se.uom_id,
  se.shift_type_id,
  se.cost_impact,
  se.scrap_date,
  se.quantity,
  se.description,
  se.root_cause,
  se.corrective_action
FROM
  scrap_event AS se
ORDER BY
  se.cost_impact DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: Which site has the best batch approval rate?
sql:
SELECT
  s.name,
  COUNT(b.batch_id) FILTER (WHERE b.status = 'approved') * 100.0 / COUNT(b.batch_id) AS batch_approval_rate
FROM
  batch AS b
  JOIN site AS s ON b.site_id = s.site_id
GROUP BY
  s.site_id,
  s.name
ORDER BY
  batch_approval_rate DESC
LIMIT 1000
